install_steps: - For GitLab: GITLAB_TOKEN (with api scope), GITLAB_API (e.g., https://gitlab.com/api/v4)
- LLM Configuration: LLM_PROVIDER (openrouter, openai, ollama, azure), LLM_API_KEY, LLM_MODEL
note: mr-pilot requires environment configuration for GitLab/GitHub tokens and LLM provider. See https://github.com/javimosch/mr-pilot for full setup instructions.
